From: Brevo <welcome@t.brevo.com>
To: john.localwebco@gmail.com
Subject: Make the most of your Brevo account

Hey John, 

 

As a new Brevo user, we want to help you hit the ground running! That’s why we’ve gathered **3 proven marketing and automation strategies** to kickstart your growth.


Happy reading!


[ Visit my Brevo account](https://my.brevo.com)


3 Strategies to Jumpstart Your Growth
-------------------------------------


####Setup Welcome Emails & Recurring Newsletters


Start by se

From: john@orangeagency.media

Hey, it's Zeno.

It's been a big month. We dropped our brand new CLI https://resend.com/changelog/cli with support for agents and humans, launched our brand new email editor https://resend.com/changelog/introducing-the-new-email-editor, and are hosting a DevTools meetup this Thursday https://events.ycombinator.com/resend-devtools-26 in San Francisco.

Before we star
